title: ALLinONE
description: ALLinONE is a complete template resource pack that combines Ranks, Fonts, Custom GUIs, Custom Model Data, and Blockstates into a single, ready-to-use package. It includes step-by-step explanations for each feature, making it easy to work with.
body:
**ALLinONE** is a **complete** template resource pack that combines **Ranks, Fonts, Custom GUIs, Custom Model Data, and Blockstates** into a single, ready-to-use package. It includes step-by-step explanations for each feature, making it easy to customize and expand for your own server or project.


![Custom Model Data and Blockstates preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59859bdc9dbedb0e80097aa337578663eb483989.png)

![Custom Ranks preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7e4643e30a489d8083c631188d07736f637fb9e.png)

![Custom GUI preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70a834fc8c184462f0573dc42908e6b42e71e6ce.png)
